cases.title: Nichols and Couch v. James River Presbytery

parties.complainant_or_appellant: RE Leland Nichols and RE Sam Couch

cases.synopsis: Three combined judicial cases (2001-34, 2002-02, 2002-03) arising from West End Presbyterian Church's attempts to dissolve its pastoral relationship with TE Robert Wilson; James River Presbytery repeatedly delayed or refused to grant the congregation's constitutionally-made request. The SJC sustained the complaints (13-3), holding that JRP had no constitutional basis to delay granting the congregation's properly voted request to dissolve the pastoral relationship, though several of the 17 individual complaints were ruled judicially out of order.
